Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Uncrowned King Tournament]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is a competition that the Blackflame Empire may seek to participate in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event that begins in fourteen months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Performing well could guarantee a spot in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is a competition where top four finishers often become Sages or Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is used to find competitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy spent most of the last Uncrowned King tournament in the head family's floating platform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event Mercy will lead a team in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Charity mentions the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an upcoming event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The eighteenth Uncrowned King tournament is being prepared for.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is representing the Akura family in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Uncrowned King tournament will occur in nine months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned King tournament involves young Lords and Ladies serving the clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned King team selection is a factor in the current events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an exhibition of future military power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon will face opponents of different aspects in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is a participant in the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Uncrowned King Tournament is one of the biggest events in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The eighteenth Uncrowned King tournament occurs three years after Sha Leiala's battle with plague-spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Participants in the tournament are re-formed an hour after being 'killed'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Uncrowned King tournament was organized by two surviving Monarchs and Heralds to pool resources and raise new Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin is a competitor in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is in its fourth round.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is a competition involving Monarchs and other high-level competitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The winner of the Uncrowned King tournament will decide the fate of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned King tournament schedule was changed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The judge of the Uncrowned King tournament spoke to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is a competition Eithan can win.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Therian Nills is participating in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — The Uncrowned tournament features fights between competitors like Yan Shoumei and Blacksword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The age limit for the Uncrowned King tournament was set to thirty-five.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Meira was almost chosen to participate in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — The Uncrowned tournament is an event where participants earn points to buy prizes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is a competition Lindon mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Maraan follows news from the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon failed to pay enough attention to the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is used to gauge the direction of the wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is a competition where Sophara could be victorious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Underlords were reenacting the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Uncrowned King tournament has recordings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin reached the top four in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is the champion of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is a competition where Divine Treasures are revealed publicly to avoid imbalance in the final round.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Charity gave Yerin access to the records of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Uncrowned King tournament has a rule against advancing past Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara and Yerin fought in the fifth and final fight of the last round of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned King tournament was hijacked by an Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is an Uncrowned of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Twin Stars is the reigning champion of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Northstrider appeared in the finals of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event Naru Huan's sister attended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The Uncrowned King tournament took place in Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event where dream tablets can be won.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event where Yerin won the Diamond Veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event where Yerin received a language construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Akura Constance asked Mercy about the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon was assigned a guest home before the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Broken Crown was a prize from the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon and Yerin represented Malice in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Uncrowned King tournament prize was Penance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon chose Wavedancer from the Uncrowned King tournament years before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon was previously torn through space violently during the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — House Gray will hold a tournament of tests and duels to select representatives to fight before the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event Yan Shoumei participates in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event where a Sage helped Yan Shoumei select her weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Uncrowned King tournament is an event that Kelsa has seen dream tablets of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The first Uncrowned King tournament featured Reigan Shen and Tiberian Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Northstrider stood in the finals of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
